title: O'Reilly for Higher Education Database
content:
O'Reilly for Higher Education Database

Dear Students,

O'Reilly for Higher Education database has been opened for trial access until 18.11.2024. The link and steps for access are given below.

1. Click on the link

https://www.oreilly.com/library-access/.

2. Click on Institution not listed.

3. Enter your e-mail address with the extension st.uskudar.edu.tr (personal e-mail addresses Gmail, Yahoo, etc. are not valid).

4. Click on the Let's Go button.

Topics:

Artificial intelligence and machine learning, cloud platforms, programming, security certification, software architecture, business, career development, data, design, hardware, software development, system administration, web and mobile.

Regards.
